title: Bridge BLE packet transport to LCI ResourceTransport
description: The Python TUI can use LciClient over IP/CoAP ResourceTransport, but BlePacketTransport is currently only a packet transport. Implement a CoAP-over-packet ResourceTransport adapter (or equivalent bridge) so TUI messaging/status/config flows can run over BLE without UI-specific branching.
acceptance_criteria: LciClient can use a BLE-backed ResourceTransport; request/observe paths are tested with fake BLE packet transport; TUI messaging flow works with the same client interface for BLE and IP.
